content: cognee.add(data, dataset_name='main_dataset', ...) -> PipelineRunInfo; cognee.cognify(datasets=None, run_in_background=False, ...) -> dict|list[PipelineRunInfo]; cognee.search(query_text, query_type=SearchType.GRAPH_COMPLETION, datasets=None, top_k=15, ...) -> List[SearchResult]; forget(dataset=..., session_id=...) is part of V2 memory API.
